name: Cherry Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dark honey (or 3 times this amount if you want it sweet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil water, pour over cherries and raisins to soak, then set aside.
2. Beat eggs and honey with a fork until well blended. Stir in yogurt and salt.
3. Break up about 8 slices of cracked wheat bread or crumble it up and stir in.
4. Add the plumped-up cherries and raisins (drain water off first).
5. Pour into a greased 5-inch x 7-inch pan or large pie tin.
6. Bake at 400°F until the aroma of bread pudding is noticeable, about 40 minutes.
6. Serve with cinnamon sprinkled on top.
Notes:
This recipe balances sweetness well without additional caramel sauce. Optional spices for the eggs include a pinch of cinnamon, mace, allspice, or cardamom powder.
